description: A compact submachine gun hailing from Czechoslovakia during the Cold War, featuring a suppressively high rate of automatic fire and shooting the Soviet 9x18mm round.

variants.//: Total unloaded weight of gun 1451.496 grams, rounded to 1451.  Current weight of folding stock 200 grams.
variants.description: A version of the Škorpion submachine gun chambered in 9x18mm Makarov, with a slightly longer barrel than the original design.
